MODULE: cosmos.core.token_budgets
FILE: cosmos/core/token_budgets.py (1269 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Token Budget Manager with DAVINCI Consensus
==============================================

"Resonating through the 12D manifold."

Per-profile token budgets, usage tracking, and multi-model debate consensus.

DAVINCI CONSENSUS: When enabled, multiple high-level AI models collaborate through


CLASSES:
- BudgetPeriod(Enum): Budget reset periods.
- UsageTier(Enum): Usage tier for cost tracking.
- ModelTier(Enum): Model tier for pricing.
- ModelPricing: Pricing information for a model.
- TokenUsage: Token usage record.
- TokenBudget: Token budget configuration for a profile.
  Methods: def tokens_remaining(self) -> int
  Methods: def cost_remaining(self) -> float
  Methods: def usage_percentage(self) -> float
  Methods: def to_any(self) -> dict
- DavinciDebateRound: A single round in a DAVINCI mode deliberation.
- DavinciSession: A DAVINCI mode multi-model deliberation session.
  Methods: def add_to_deliberation_box(self, model: str, round_num: int, message: str, msg_type: str='response'
  Methods: def render_debate_box(self) -> str
  Methods: def to_any(self) -> dict
- TokenBudgetManager: Token budget management with BENDER mode support.

Features:
- Per-profile token
  Methods: def create_budget(self, profile_id: str, name: str, max_tokens: int, period: BudgetPeriod=BudgetPeri
  Methods: def get_budget(self, profile_id: str) -> Optional[TokenBudget]
  Methods: def update_budget(self, profile_id: str, **updates) -> Optional[TokenBudget]
  Methods: def delete_budget(self, profile_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: def check_budget(self, profile_id: str, model_id: str, estimated_tokens: int) -> dict
  Methods: def record_usage(self, profile_id: str, model_id: str, input_tokens: int, output_tokens: int, sessio
  Methods: def add_alert_handler(self, handler: Callable)
  Methods: async def check_bender_mode(self, profile_id: str, models: list[str], estimated_rounds: int=20) -> d
